name: Jefferson Davis Pie
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit. Cream together butter and brown sugar. Beat in the egg yolks. Mix together flour and spices and then add them to the mixture. Stir in cream, dates, raisins, and pecans. Fill the shell and bake the pie until set, about 30 minutes. When cool, use 2 or 3 egg whites to make a meringue as a topping. The dates are not necessary but provide an extra flavor;without them and the nuts it is called a Kentucky or Arkansas pie. This recipe is a great favorite in southern cafeteria and small town restaurants.
